26780.title: Bad Move
26780.description: Nicky and Steve's move to their dream house in the country is rapidly turning into a nightmare because they cannot get connected to the internet.

26798.title: Bad Move
26798.description: When Nicky and Steve discover their kitchen has flooded, Steve thinks the source of the flooding is a natural spring and hopes it will be the answer to all their problems.

26806.title: Bad Move
26806.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

26807.title: Bad Move
26807.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.
